description: ixigo is an Indian online travel platform for searching, planning, and booking trains, flights, buses, and hotels. It also provides travel status, itinerary planning, and related travel information through its web and mobile apps.
summary: ixigo exposes a public MCP server at `https://api.ixigo.com/bridgeai/mcp`; no public developer HTTP/GraphQL API docs or CLI were found on the ixigo.com domain.
